job_stories.title: Generate Tests from Source File
job_stories.situation: I have a source file with functions that need test coverage
job_stories.motivation: quickly add meaningful tests without writing them manually
job_stories.outcome: I have a runnable test suite covering happy paths, edge cases, and error handling

acceptance_criteria.given: I am on the Test Generator page
acceptance_criteria.when: I select a TypeScript or Python source file
acceptance_criteria.then: The tool displays the file contents with detected functions highlighted
A progress indicator shows analysis steps: parsing, analyzing branches, generating tests
Each generated test has a descriptive name, clear arrange/act/assert structure, and a comment explaining what it validates

acceptance_criteria.when: I click 'Copy to Clipboard' or 'Save as File'
acceptance_criteria.then: The test file is saved with the correct naming convention (e.g., *.test.ts, *_test.py)

job_stories.title: Discover and Test Edge Cases
job_stories.situation: the AI has analyzed my source code
job_stories.motivation: find boundary conditions and error paths I might have missed
job_stories.outcome: I have tests for scenarios I would not have thought of manually

acceptance_criteria.when: The AI generates edge case tests
acceptance_criteria.then: Tests include zero, negative numbers, MAX_SAFE_INTEGER, NaN, and Infinity

acceptance_criteria.when: The AI generates edge case tests
acceptance_criteria.then: Tests include empty string, very long string, unicode characters, and special characters

acceptance_criteria.given: A function has error handling (try/catch, if/throw)
acceptance_criteria.then: At least one test verifies each error path is triggered with appropriate assertions
Mock setup is included with both success and failure scenarios for each dependency

job_stories.title: Configure Framework and Preferences
job_stories.situation: I want to generate tests for a specific project setup
job_stories.motivation: ensure generated tests match my team's conventions and tooling
job_stories.outcome: I get tests that fit seamlessly into my existing test suite

acceptance_criteria.given: I am on the settings page
acceptance_criteria.when: I select a test framework from the dropdown
acceptance_criteria.then: The options include Jest, Vitest, and Pytest with framework-specific import styles

acceptance_criteria.given: I have configured Vitest as my framework
acceptance_criteria.then: The output uses Vitest imports (vi.fn, vi.mock) and describe/it/expect syntax

acceptance_criteria.given: I toggle off 'Integration tests' in settings
acceptance_criteria.then: Only unit tests are produced with all external calls mocked
